n: Sant Lhoer, the Poison Gardens -- Solo/Duo

steps.t: You have entered the Poison Gardens of Carn Dûm, Sant Lhoer. You should use the nearby summoning horn to call an ally, Forba, to your side.
You should explore Sant Lhoer and look for the sorceress Oganuin. <rgb=#FF0000>NOTE: You can use the 'Call Forba' skill to call Forba to your si…
Within Sant Lhoer you have come across an Angmarim sorcerer, Cráthair, and his companion, the Jorthkyn Tarkka-oka. The latter is like nothing you have…
When you defeated Tarkka-oka and Cráthair, you acquired the key to the North Gate. You should unlock the North Gate and continue on. <rgb=#FF0000&g…
You stand before Bâr Heledh, the Glass House of Carn Dûm. Within its metal and glass walls the sorceress Oganuin practices her fell crafts, creating a…
